source: Anchoring attraction a(p->q) = (s_q/s_p) * 1/d^n (Lerdahl, Tonal Pitch Space, OUP 2001, ch. 4; Bharucha 1984 anchoring). Stability tables FROZEN from the kk-1982.1 key profiles (Krumhansl & Kessler 1982) — copied, not read live, so a key-profile default flip can never silently move tendency scales (the versioned-priors discipline; margin-scale precedent). chord_anchor_boost is Lerdahl's basic-space triad/diatonic level ratio (3/2), applied to the stability of chord tones in both source and target roles when a chord context is given. Fork record (2026-07-07, Julian): stability source = KK-derived; target policy is a caller parameter (rulesets/styles may select it), default diatonic_steps; chord anchoring ships in slice 1.
